omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Device type, operating system, language, region, app usage statistics, and interactions within the app. This information is collected to help us improve app performance and enhance the user experience.

Device type, operating system, language, region, app usage statistics, and interactions within the app. This information is collected to help us improve app performance and enhance the user experience.

We may use or allow third-party services (such as advertising networks and analytics tools) to collect anonymous information. This may include general device information, app usage data, and region/language settings. The purpose of this data collection is to display relevant advertisements, measure app performance, and improve our services.
